name: integrated-industry-maker
description: AI-native industrial production design, deterministic simulation, and automated blueprint optimization

scripts.test: bun run typecheck && bun test packages/inm-core packages/inm-cli && bun run inm test examples/ironworks
scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc -p packages/inm-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/inm-cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p packages/inm-studio/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bunx tsc -p examples/ironworks/assets/tsconfig.json --noEmit
